zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Cunningham於1533年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾格倫加諾可時，她的父親Alexander Cunningham, Earl of Glencairn23歲，母親Janet “Jean” Hamilton16歲。她於1521年與John V Blair (8th Lord of Blair)在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾霍賀亞德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1573年7月20日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉享年40歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾達爾布萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Cunningham was born in 1533, in Glengarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander Cunningham, Earl of Glencairn, was 23 and her mother, Janet “Jean” Hamilton, was 16. She married John V Blair (8th Lord of Blair) in 1521, in Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 July 1573, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Dalblair, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Cunningham est née en 1533, à Glengarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Cunningham, Earl of Glencairn, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Janet “Jean” Hamilton, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John V Blair (8th Lord of Blair) en 1521, à Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1573, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Dalblair, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Cunningham 1533 in Glengarnock, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Cunningham, Earl of Glencairn 23 und ihre Mutter Janet “Jean” Hamilton 16. Sie hat 1521 in Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom John V Blair (8th Lord of Blair) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1573 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Dalblair, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cunninghamが1533年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアグレンガーノックで生まれた時，父Alexander Cunningham, Earl of Glencairnは23歳，母Janet “Jean” Hamiltonは16歳であった。1521年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアハウクヘドでJohn V Blair (8th Lord of Blair)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1573年7月20日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで40歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダルブレイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cunningham(이)가 1533년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 글렌가노크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Cunningham, Earl of Glencairn(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet “Jean” Hamilton(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1521년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 호크헤드에서 John V Blair (8th Lord of Blair)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 7월 20일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 다블레이르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Cunningham родилась в 1533 г. в местности гленгарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander Cunningham, Earl of Glencairn было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Janet “Jean” Hamilton, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John V Blair (8th Lord of Blair) в 1521 г. в местности ховхид, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 июля 1573 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности далблеир, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
